name: NIST AI RMF Generative AI Profile

controls.title: CBRN Information or Capabilities
controls.description: Lowered barriers to chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear information, or their synthesis and dissemination.

controls.title: Confabulation
controls.description: Confidently stated but erroneous or false content ("hallucination") that may mislead or deceive users.

controls.title: Dangerous, Violent, or Hateful Content
controls.description: Eased production of violent, inciting, radicalizing, or hateful content, or recommendations for self-harm or illegal activity.

controls.title: Data Privacy
controls.description: Leakage or unauthorized use, disclosure, or de-anonymization of personal or sensitive data.

controls.title: Environmental Impacts
controls.description: High compute resource use for training and operation with associated energy and environmental cost.

controls.title: Harmful Bias or Homogenization
controls.description: Amplification of harmful bias, discrimination, or homogenization of outputs and perspectives.

controls.title: Human-AI Configuration
controls.description: Improper configuration of the human-AI interaction, including overreliance, automation bias, and unclear roles.

controls.title: Information Integrity
controls.description: Generation and amplification of mis- and dis-information degrading the integrity of the information ecosystem.

controls.title: Information Security
controls.description: Lowered barriers to offensive cyber capability, plus vulnerabilities introduced by GenAI systems (e.g. prompt injection, data poisoning).

controls.title: Intellectual Property
controls.description: Infringement or unauthorized use of copyrighted, trademarked, or licensed material via training data or output.

controls.title: Obscene, Degrading, and/or Abusive Content
controls.description: Production of obscene, degrading, or abusive content, including non-consensual intimate imagery and CSAM.

controls.title: Value Chain and Component Integration
controls.description: Risks from non-transparent or untraceable integration of third-party components, data, and models across the value chain.
